venues.branchIdentity: KYND Community Seminyak; live production snapshot confirms active status and district=seminyak, while the official venue map resolves to KYND COMMUNITY SEMINYAK.
collectionNotes: The official site describes a shared three-location menu and calls it a sample; this record fully parses the captured four-page May 2026 PDF, not any unlisted separate menu.
Every displayed price uses k notation and is normalized as integer IDR where unambiguous; source price text is preserved verbatim.
All prices are subject to 10% tax and 6% service.
Gojek and Grab delivery are stated on the official site, but no Seminyak branch-deep URLs are published, so no delivery capability is fabricated.
The official dinner short-link resolved to KYNDCanggu at capture and is rejected for this Seminyak record.
PDF title metadata: WEBSITE MENU > FOOD & DRINKS.
PDF created and modified 2026-05-11 11:36:15 WITA; four pages visually inspected after text extraction.
All prices are subject to 10% tax and 6% service.
PDF describes some grouped variants under one displayed price; grouped lines remain grouped rather than inventing separate prices.
